resources.string: This application requires the latest version of Google Play Services for AR.
This feature requires the latest version of Google Play Services for AR.
Installing Google Play Services for AR…
Save photos & videos to a private storage space in Google Photos on your device
You can find Locked Folder in Google Photos in the Library tab
"%s The format used to store the color when encoding."

"Lens smudges aren't always easy to see, and they can come from fingerprints, oil or dirt.
Clean your lens for better photo quality."
Want to be in the group photo?
Creates a cinematic effect by blurring the background behind your subject and records at 24 frames/sec
If there are \"pink spots\" in the photo in low light - try changing the value of this menu item.
Tap on a subject to focus
More true to life with a wider range of colors, brightness, and contrast
You will need to join the AR dogfood program with your work profile to download the update.
%s requires the latest version of the Google Play Services for AR app
Image of the night sky taken with Astrophotography, showcasing a brilliant display of stars
Place phone on a steady surface like a tripod or rock.
The shutter will change from a moon to stars. Tap it.
{count, plural, =1{# minute remaining} other{# minutes remaining}}
Capture stunning photos of the night sky
Turn on camera sounds and unmute phone to hear when photo is ready
Move to darker environment for better results
Phone is unstable. Use a tripod or place the phone on a steady surface.
"%s to work, need to fill in all 4 the fields below:"
Enter the ID of the module(modules - separated by commas), you want to hide.
Place your phone on a tripod or steady surface
When the shutter changes from a moon to stars, tap it
Get in the shot and smile or make a funny face to get photos automatically. Tap the button to start.
Drag yellow box to frame subject
Tap thumbnail to frame the image
To adjust brightness, reset shutter speed and ISO
Reset shutter speed and ISO to auto
Tap the burst button to show the best photos only
"Hue and saturation settings, custom CCT. (does not work when GAWB is enabled)"
Setting up a custom shading map (must be enabled in developer options).
"By default from Google. The image processing style depends on the selected library."
"Your organization doesn't allow you to use Camera. Contact your IT admin for more info."
Since restarting your phone didn’t help, the problem could be due to issues with your camera’s hardware or software
Since you’ve already restarted the Camera app, try turning your phone off and back on.
Close and open the Camera app again.
Device offline. Photo quality and features may be limited until Camera app is updated.
"Camera doesn't have permission to save to this location."
Works best in good lighting. You can adjust palm timer settings in Camera Settings.
Take a selfie from a distance by showing your palm to start a photo timer
Take a selfie from a distance. Show your palm to start the timer. Palm timer may not work in low light conditions.
Video showing how palm timer works.
Go to settings to turn on
Record action that takes a long time – say, a sunset – in a video that plays back in a shorter time
Learn more about Cinematic Blur mode
Creates a cinematic effect by blurring the background behind your subject and records at 24 frames/sec
"Slows down your phone's panning movements for professional-looking cinematic shots."
"Slows down your phone's panning movements. Great for professional-looking cinematic shots."
Regular speed panning video of waterfall side-by-side with cinematic panning video of the same waterfall.
Learn more about Cinematic Pan mode
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Connect to internet to see examples
Combine two photos so you can be included with the group.
Wait longer for a better photo
Takes vibrant and bright photos in low light
Camera automatically made the faces in this photo clearer.
There is not enough storage available to continue capturing. You can free up space in the Files app.
This application may not work properly without enabling Google VR Services, please enable this in phone Settings before continuing.
This application may not work properly without Google VR Services. Please install Google VR Services from the Play Store before continuing.
Available in Dogfood only. Please do not share. See go/pixel-photo-sharing.
Quickly press the power button twice to open camera. To take a photo, press the volume button.
Video showing how Google camera can be launched by double tap power key and how photos can be taken with volume key
This app was not found on your device.
Try a bright, static scene with a detailed background.
Add Me supports a max of %d people.
Add Me works best in a bright, static scene with a detailed background.
To use Camera, unlock your device and turn on Camera, Microphone, and Storage permissions
To use Camera, turn on Camera, Microphone, and Storage permissions.
To adjust exposure, reset shutter speed and ISO
Reset shutter speed and ISO to auto
Bluetooth mic connected. Go to settings to change.
Bluetooth disconnected. Mic updated to phone.
Mic input updated. Go to settings to change.
Wired mic connected. Go to settings to change.
Wired mic disconnected. Mic updated to phone.
If you don’t have a tripod or another person to take a photo for you, %s combines two photos so you can be included.
This feature is in its early stages. Combined images may include unexpected or inaccurate results.
Image of one person posing next to where the two people were
Combined photo showing all three people, as if they were posing at the same time
• For best results, the person you’re adding should be unblocked and fully visible
• Only one person can be added in the 2nd photo

This video demonstrates how to use the Add Me feature. Two people are posing and a photo is taken. They leave the frame while another person enters next to where they once were. Another photo is taken. The final combined photo is as if all three people were posing at the same time.
New HDR + algorithm, replacing HDR + E and ZSL HDR +. Quality may differ from normal HDR +.
Edits the library selected above when the application starts.

"When you take Top Shot photos or touch and hold for Top Shot, Frequent Faces prioritizes the people you photograph most.
This helps your camera show skin tones more accurately and recommend the best photos.
Frequent Faces data is only saved on this device, and can only be accessed by this Camera app.
When you turn off Frequent Faces, faces data will be deleted.
Frequent Faces will be available when you open Camera from the lock screen.
Frequent Faces won’t be available when saving photos and videos to Locked Folder."
"For continuous AF mode, unlocking AF and waiting to converge. %s"
More true to life with a wider range of colors, brightness, and contrast
10-bit HDR can’t be used unless video frames/sec is set to 30.
10-bit HDR can’t be used unless video frames/sec is set to 24 or 30.
"10-bit HDR can't be used when one of these features is on: Video frames/sec in Auto, 60 (except when Video Boost is on), 8K"
High resolution image with richer detail
To start, keep dot inside circle
Palm timer will be disabled when Guided Frame is on.

"Take selfies with the help of audio and vibrations.
With TalkBack, audio and vibrations will guide you towards the center of the viewfinder. After a 3 second countdown, a photo will be taken."
You can turn off Guided Frame in Camera Settings.
Video showing how Guided Frame helps you to take a photo.

"Use audio cues, vibrations, and visuals to let you know when subjects are framed correctly for a photo. A photo will be taken automatically or you can press the shutter button. Guided Frame will help you recognize faces, pets, and certain objects."

"When TalkBack is on and you’re focused on the shutter button or viewfinder, audio cues, vibrations, and visuals will let you know when subjects are framed correctly for a photo. A photo will be taken automatically or you can press the shutter button. By default, you can also press the volume button to take a photo manually. Guided Frame will help you recognize faces, pets, and certain objects."

"Use audio cues, vibrations, and visuals to let you know when subjects are framed correctly for a photo. A photo will be taken automatically or you can press the shutter button. Guided Frame will help you recognize faces, pets, and certain objects."
Volume buttons adjust sound in Guided Frame
Notification will be sent when the video is ready and video will be downloaded on Wi-Fi
Turn on Video Boost and record a video
Backup and boosting may take time
The initial video is instantly available after recording
Capture stopped. Move phone in one direction.
Capture stopped. Phone moved too fast.
Capture stopped. Taking a horizontal pano? Rotate phone to portrait.
Capture stopped. Taking a vertical pano? Rotate phone to landscape.
Rotate phone to portrait for horizontal pano.
Rotate phone to landscape for vertical pano.
Try vertical panorama by rotating to landscape
Please wait a few seconds while we put the finishing touches on your camera
"Camera can't be used while updates are installing"
Invalid version of Google Camera App detected
Lowering ISO provides the sharpest image with the lowest noise possible. Increasing ISO helps you freeze motion.
To adjust ISO, reset shutter speed and brightness
Reset shutter speed and brightness to auto
Use the rear camera for a selfie in higher resolution.
Use the rear camera for a selfie in higher resolution.
Example photo of higher resolution selfie
{count, plural, =1{Wait at least # minute to capture a time lapse in addition to a photo.} other{Wait at least # minutes to capture a time lapse in addition to a photo.}}
Manual lens selection replaces the default zoom toggle with a control that allows you to explicitly pick which lens is being used.
Device is too hot. 50MP has been turned off.
Tap video preview to get photos from this video

"%s
The quality of the photo depends on the chosen method of gluing frames."
Calling the window with configs by double clicking on the dark area around the shutter release. The format should be .xml
Similar to resetting app data and cache.
Configs are stored in the /Download/MGC_CONFIG/9.6.080/ folder.
Old algorithm for creating a capture session
Calls the “Advanced settings” menu of the active module
Calls the settings menu of the active module
Reduce camera shake to make videos smoother. Will result in a zoomed-in view.
Reduce camera shake to make videos smoother. Will not result in a zoomed-in view.
Most often, devices with a Level3 hardware level require the YUV format, and devices with a FULL hardware level require a JPEG format.
Take detailed close-up photos and videos. Move close to the object and watch as the details come into focus automatically.
"Macro Focus can't be used when one of these features is on: Auto Night Sight, Lock Focus."
"Macro Focus can't be used when one of these features is on: Lock Focus, Video Boost"
"Macro Focus can't be used when one of these features is on: Auto Night Sight, Lock Focus, Manual Focus, Manual Lens Selection."
In Night Sight mode, select Astro
Stabilize the phone. Wait until photo is captured.
Tap the shutter to start the 5 sec timer
Adjusting manual focus allows you to determine what is in focus. Focus is locked once you leave the focus control.
"Highlighted lines will indicate what's in focus before you take a photo."
Picture in picture shows you a more detailed view to better indicate what is in focus. This is helpful for things that are farther away.
Storage space using device screen lock
"This feature isn't available for your Photos account"
"This feature isn't available for work profiles or fully managed devices"
Allows you to adjust Exposure / ISO in the modes \"Photo\" and \"Portrait\"
To reset the value of the text field to \"default\" value - enter an empty text field
"When switching between modules and photo modes (applied to all modules at the same time)."
Focuses on a moving subject and adds a creative blur to the background. Hold your camera still or follow the subject to get the motion effect.
Example photo of Action Pan effect
Adds a creative blur to moving subjects in the scene. Hold your camera still to capture professional-looking photos without a tripod.
Example photo of Long Exposure effect
Focuses on a moving subject and adds a creative blur to the background
Adds a creative blur to moving subjects in the scene
Go to your photo gallery, tap on the photo to see the scrub bar and pick a frame
In photo gallery, motion photos can play automatically if set to auto-play
Top Shot captures a short video, so you can choose the frames that are worth saving
Top Shot can’t be used when one of these features is on: Flash, Social Media Depth features, Night Sight, Selfie Illumination, High-Resolution
When \"Override sharpen polysharp sigma\" larger than 0, overrides sharpen tuning with approximation
Enter the ID of the module(modules - separated by commas), you want to add.
An update is available for Camera
To use Night Sight video, Locked Folder needs to be turned off
To use Night Sight video, turn off Storage Saver in Settings
Capture vibrant and detailed Time Lapse videos when it’s dark
The shutter will display a moon icon when it’s dark enough. Tap to start recording.
Place phone on a steady surface like a tripod or rock
1080p: %1$d mins of recording for a %2$d sec video. 4K: %3$d mins of recording for a %4$d sec video. Only available in the Auto speed option.
Night Sight auto enabled. Learn more
Set speed option to Auto to use this feature
"Set speed option to Auto to use this feature. Night Sight in Time Lapse can't be used when zoom level is below %1$sx."
Still recording. Screen dimmed to save power.
With Night Sight Video, your recorded video will get boosted with improved lighting, clearer picture, and amplified colors
Learn more about Night Sight Video
Videos will need to be under a certain length and backed up in Google Photos. Learn more
Videos will need to be under a certain length and backed up in Google Photos. Learn more
To use horizontal Panorama, end capture and rotate your device
To use vertical Panorama, end capture and rotate your device
Try moving phone a little slower
To view your photos and media, enable Google Photos in Settings.
To view your photos and media, install Google Photos from Play Store.
All finished. Press the capture button and have fun!

"Calibrate your camera for Photo Sphere.
1. Align dot with circle"
2. Rotate up or down to align next dot
Drag to look around the interactive photo
Your fisheye is not complete, process anyway?
Sorry, your device does not have a back facing camera
Adds effects to make professional-looking portraits
Zooming in on subject boosts sound and reduces background noise
On-screen tips and tools, like levelers and focus tips
Select hotkeys to control camera actions.
Display warning when the lens may be too dirty to take high-quality pictures. Wiping off the lens may help.
Point your camera to scan QR codes and documents
Other apps may be able to view photo & video location info
Save selfie photos as they appear in the viewer
Cannot be turned off for your SIM or region
Flashes the back camera light during the timer countdown.
Depth data will be saved. This data may be used by social media apps. Top Shot will be turned off and photos may take longer to process.
Camera uses Macro Focus automatically when taking photos at a close range
Clean up storage on this device. This will take you to Files app.
Show manual control for HDR+. When this setting is off, HDR+ stays on all the time.
Use H.265/HEVC format instead of H.264/AVC for a smaller file size. HEVC may not be supported on some platforms.
Take photos with the help of audio, vibrations and visual cues
Use audio cues, vibrations, and visuals to help frame faces in photos
Export photo and time lapse. Uses more storage space.
Ultra HDR brightens the lightest parts of images and shows more vibrant colors than default HDR+ processing.
Turn off when storage is available
"Storage Saver turns off when there's at least %d GB of storage available on your device."
To optimize storage space, Storage Saver will change settings that use large amounts of storage. This may reduce image or video quality.
Use Display P3 color format instead of sRGB for richer and more vibrant colors. Display P3 may not be visible before the photo is taken or supported on all platforms or apps.
Adjust white balance, brightness, and shadows by tapping the viewfinder

Show option to turn on RAW+JPEG in the viewer. RAW files preserve details and offer more controls while editing. They take up more storage space. RAW photos will be backed up by default if automatic backup is enabled in Google Photos.
Restores true colors when taking photos and videos underwater. Make sure to use a waterproof case.
Reduce camera shake to make videos smoother. Will result in a zoomed-in view.
To take a photo, press either volume key.
You need to manually connect to %s
App needs to request Wi-Fi permission
QR code contains incorrect Wi-Fi password
QR code contains incorrect Wi-Fi network name
RAW files preserve details and offer more controls while editing. They take up more storage space. RAW photos will be backed up by default if automatic backup is enabled in Google Photos.
For a higher resolution selfie, switch to a different mode.
Pick the best moment from a few suggested frames
To use 8K, turn off Storage Saver in Settings
Face retouching adjusts skin texture, under-eye tone, and eye brightness
Portrait of a person with subtle face retouching applied. Their skin texture is smoothed slightly, and skin features like stubble and freckles are reduced but still visible.
Portrait of a person with no face retouching applied. Their skin is not smoothed with Face Retouching.
Portrait photo of a person with smooth face retouching applied. Their skin texture is visibly smoothed, and skin features like freckles and stubble may not be apparent.
Turn your face to the lower left.
Turn your face to the lower right.
Turn your face to the left.
Turn your face to the right.
Turn your face to the upper left.
Turn your face to the upper right.
With Video Boost, your recorded video will get enhanced color, lighting, and stabilization
With Video Boost, your recorded video will get enhanced color, lighting, and stabilization. You can also record in 8K resolution.
Use the rear screen to show your subject a preview of the image.
To use dual screen switch to photo and unfold.
To use Dual Screen, turn off Battery Saver mode
Device too warm for Dual Screen
When you take a selfie, try holding the camera slightly above your eyes.
Try lifting camera for a different angle
Tap shutter and pause briefly on dots
Tap shutter and hold still before moving
Save your photos and videos to a private storage space in Google Photos on your device. Open Locked Folder using your current device screen lock option.
Adjusting to a faster shutter speed lets you freeze motion and a slower shutter speed captures motion blur and light trails.
To adjust shutter speed, reset ISO and brightness
Reset ISO and brightness to auto
Cannot share to %s! Please try again.
Great for capturing clear speech in noisy locations. Reduces unwanted noises like wind, traffic, and crowds. Works best with a single speaker.
"Speech Enhancement can't be used unless video frames/sec is set to 30"
"Speech Enhancement can't be used unless video frames/sec is set to 24 or 30"
You can turn it on in Camera settings
Unstabilized video of person jetskiing on water side-by-side with active stabilization video of the same subject.
"Gives you smooth video when you're on the move. Great for action shots."
Unstabilized video of person surfing on water side-by-side with locked stabilization video of the same subject.
"Keeps camera locked onto your scene like a tripod. Great when you don't need to move the camera."
Unstabilized video of person surfing on water side-by-side with standard stabilized video of the same subject.
Steadies light movements. Great for everyday shots.
Hand off the Pixel and join the scene
Align the frame and take a photo
Photos will be saved as JPEG only
Videos will be saved as H.265/HEVC
Photos will be saved as still images
Photos will be saved in medium resolution
Photos will be saved in default resolution
Videos will be recorded in Full HD (1080p)
Videos will be recorded in 30 frames a second
To start, touch the icon below
Focus on objects as close as %dcm
Tap on the icon to turn on and off
Device is too hot. Auto Macro has been turned off.
Device is too hot. Zoom stabilization has been turned off.
Device is too hot. Exposure controls are limited.
Device is too hot. Flash has been turned off.
Device is too hot. Close Camera until device cools off.
Recording may end suddenly. Device is hot.
Recording stopped. Close Camera until device cools off.
Device is too hot. Video quality may be reduced.
Good for dramatic speed slow down
Try Video Boost with Night Sight
To change this setting, turn off Storage Saver in Settings
Failed to update camera. Please file a bug.
Update is ready. Tap to restart and install.
"Volume buttons will adjust sound when you're using Made You Look"
Double tap to show animation on rear screen
Double tap to hide animation selector
Show playful animations to grab kids’ attention for picture-perfect smiles
Double tap to show animation selector
To use Made You Look switch to photo and unfold.
To use Made You Look, turn off Battery Saver mode
Device too warm for Made You Look
"To use Made You Look, rotate your phone"
Double tap to turn sound on.
Double tap to turn sound off.
Something went wrong. Try recording again.
Frame rate reduced to improve video quality
Recording stopped and saved due to low battery
Can’t record due to low battery
"Can't record audio. Microphone is off or in use."
Something went wrong. Part of this video may not be saved.
Something went wrong. Part of last video may not have saved.
Video not saved. Recording time too short.
"Couldn't record video. Leave video mode, then try again."
Boosting Night Sight Video will take time
To use Video Boost, Locked Folder needs to be turned off.
To use Video Boost, turn off Storage Saver in Settings
Record low light videos in higher quality with enhanced lighting, stabilization, and definition
To view in/use 4K, switch the screen ratio to 16:9
"4K can't be used for this ratio"
Video reached the 100 GB size limit.
Try Video Boost for better zoom quality
Night Sight works best with a bit of light
Import reads .cube/.plut files from /sdcard/MGC/import and lists public LUTs from /sdcard/MGC/luts.
Manage LUT filters and choose the active look.
